forecasts.detailed: Rain. Cloudy. High near 48, with temperatures falling to around 40 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

Rain showers before 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 47. Northwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
